name: Shanghai Jinfeng Wine Company Limited
summary: Shanghai Jinfeng Wine Company Limited produces and operates rice wine in China. It offers wine under the Shikumen, He, Golden Age, Wake up, Huiquan, White tower, Beautiful, and holy family brand names. The company was formerly known as Shanghai First Food Co., Ltd. Shanghai Jinfeng Wine Company Limited was founded in 1952 and is based in Shanghai, China.
